steps.t: Ward pieces can be found near Púkel-men statues in the Drúadan Forest. You should collect ward pieces for the Woses.
Ghâr-buri-Bhâm is in Drû Bhûta. You should bring the ward pieces to Ghâr-buri-Bhâm so that he can craft a new ward for the village.
Ghâr-buri-Bhâm is in Drû Bhûta. You should speak with Ghâr-buri-Bhâm about the ward.
Ghân-buri-Ghân can be found in Drû Bhûta. You should speak with Ghân-buri-Ghân.
